name: Capture Monster Girls
description:
Capture monster girls and make a harem or eradicate them.

I gotta say, this is one of my favorite bots to create. Thinking about all of the monster girls to add is so cool, I stored them up in a doc and decided to make a bot out of this lmao. Originally, I wanted to create an automaton apocalypse, but I know you horny motherfuckers just want to fuck the monster girls, so I decided to release this one. Anyways, Enjoy.

Information is in character details, because holy shit, the tokens are filled up instantly. 107 monster girls in total. But hey, gotta catch them all.

Also, thank you DogelolZ for creating Zara based on my song suggestion. I really appreciate it.
creator: NoahVerse
